zh.Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough於1481年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛時，他的父親John Neale31歲，母親Elizabeth Belsher21歲。他於大約1510年與Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1514年住在英國貝德福爾也爾登且於1519年住在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。他去世於1532年12月13日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough于1481年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛时，他的父亲John Neale31岁，母亲Elizabeth Belsher21岁。他于大约1510年与Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1514年住在英国貝德福爾也爾登且于1519年住在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛。他去世于1532年12月13日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Neal
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French, Anglo-Norman French, and Middle English personal name Neel, Nele, Nihel, Niel, itself derived from the Latin name Nigellus (a diminutive of Latin niger ‘black’), originally a nickname for someone with black hair or a dark complexion. The name was very common among Normans and was brought to England at the time of the Norman Conquest. There has been considerable confusion with the Irish and Scottish Gaelic name Niall (see Neil ); the two names are now pronounced identically. It is theoretically possible that in Normandy, where the personal name was popular, that it was also used for Old Norse Njáll, but this is difficult to prove. Njáll was adopted from the Irish Gaelic personal name Niall by Vikings in Ireland, who took it back to Iceland and Norway, but whether the Vikings also took Njáll to Normandy and to the northwest of England, is an open question, which cannot be settled on the available evidence.
English: alternatively from the Middle English personal name Nele, a variant of Nell as a pet form of Elias (see Ellis ). Compare Nelson , Nielson .
Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   McNeal   (see   McNeil  ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough was born in 1481, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Neale, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Belsher, was 21. He married Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire about 1510, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He lived in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England in 1514 and Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England in 1519. He died on 13 December 1532, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough est né en 1481, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Neale, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Belsher, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire environ 1510, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il a vécu à Yelden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre en 1514 et à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre en 1519. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1532, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough 1481 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Neale 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Belsher 21. Er hat um 1510 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1514 hat er in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England und 1519 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1532 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough è nato il nel 1481 nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Neale, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Belsher, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire circa 1510, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Vissuto a Yelden, Bedfordshire, England nel 1514 e nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England nel 1519. Morì il 13 dicembre 1532, nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesboroughが1481年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで生まれた時，父John Nealeは31歳，母Elizabeth Belsherは21歳であった。約1510年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでEmlyn Elizabeth De Cheshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1514年にはイギリスベドフォードシュアイアイエルデンに，1519年にはイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウに住んでいた。彼は1532年12月13日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough(이)가 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Neale(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Belsher(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1510년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1514년도에 영국 베드퍼드실르 옐든에서, 1519년도에 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 살았다. 그는 1532년 12월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough nasceu em 1481, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Neale, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Belsher, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire aproximadamente 1510, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele viveu em Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra em 1514 e em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra em 1519. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1532, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough родился в 1481 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Neale было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Belsher, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire около 1510 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он жил в местности иелден, бедфордшир, Англия в 1514 году и в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия в 1519 году. Он умер 13 декабря 1532 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Neale Esquire of Ellesborough nació en 1481, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Neale, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Belsher, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Emlyn Elizabeth De Cheshire aproximadamente 1510, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Vivió en Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra en 1514 y en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra en 1519. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1532, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
